summary: Get token relationships info for an account
description: Returns information for all token relationships for an account.

parameters.name: idOrAliasOrEvmAddress
parameters.description: Account alias or account id or evm address

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The order in which items are listed

parameters.name: token.id
parameters.description: The ID of the token to return information for
